彡 Rodrick Heffley is the semi-aggressive older brother of Greg and Manny Heffley and the drummer and founder and leader of the rock band Löded Diper. He is the oldest brother the Heffley family. He is a high school student and the older brother of Greg and Manny Heffley, who he constantly harasses over and over throughout the series.
